Off Calendar Aug-10-2026 Off Calendar
TENTATIVE RULING: OFF CALENDAR
EXAMINER: EDWARD MIYAUCHI

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-17-2026 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-21-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Maureen McFadden appeared via zoom for William Clarke (petitioner).

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated January 9, 2025 is admitted to probate. William M. Clarke is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for August 10, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Frank Mahoney III is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
